recommendations.title: The Tall T
recommendations.overview: An independent former ranch foreman and an heiress are kidnapped by a trio of ruthless outlaws.

recommendations.title: Comanche Station
recommendations.overview: A white man trades with the Comanche for the release of a female stranger and the pair cross paths with three outlaws who have their eyes on the handsome reward for bringing her home and Comanche on the warpath.

recommendations.title: 7 Men from Now
recommendations.overview: A former sheriff relentlessly pursuing the 7 men who murdered his wife in Arizona crosses paths with a couple heading to California.

recommendations.title: The Naked Spur
recommendations.overview: A bounty hunter trying to bring a murderer to justice is forced to accept the help of two less-than-trustworthy strangers.

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Unforgiven
recommendations.overview: William Munny is a retired, once-ruthless killer turned gentle widower and hog farmer. To help support his two motherless children, he accepts one last bounty-hunter mission to find the men who brutalized a prostitute. Joined by his former partner an

recommendations.title: The Salvation
recommendations.overview: In 1870s America, a peaceful American settler kills his family's murderer which unleashes the fury of a notorious gang leader. His cowardly fellow townspeople then betray him, forcing him to hunt down the outlaws alone.

recommendations.title: The Hateful Eight
recommendations.overview: Bounty hunters seek shelter from a raging blizzard and get caught up in a plot of betrayal and deception.

recommendations.title: The Interview
recommendations.overview: A duel between a suspected murderer and a detective pressed by people who want results. But whose skin is really wanted?
